message:
Comprehensive Redis command correctness, stream group cleanup on key removal, transaction memory enforcement, and protocol hardening

Command dispatch (fr-command):
- Add is_write_command() public classifier covering all ~70 write commands,
  replacing the error-prone read-command blacklist approach for replication
  offset advancement and AOF recording
- Add 512MB size limit for SETRANGE to match Redis behavior
- Add 2^32 offset upper bound for SETBIT matching Redis bitmap limits
- Validate BITOP NOT requires exactly one source key
- Validate ZUNIONSTORE/ZINTERSTORE require at least 1 input key
- Rewrite parse_scan_args to return Result with proper validation:
  require MATCH/COUNT to have following arguments, validate COUNT is a
  positive integer, reject unrecognized keywords; applies to SCAN,
  HSCAN, SSCAN, ZSCAN

Event loop (fr-eventloop):
- Fix write delivery order validation to track prev_index across both
  flushed and pending slices instead of resetting per-slice, preventing
  false positives where the first pending item has a lower queue
  position than the last flushed item

Protocol (fr-protocol):
- Return InvalidBulkLength instead of Incomplete when bulk string
  CRLF terminator is malformed, preventing infinite retry loops on
  corrupted frames
- Cap Vec::with_capacity for array parsing to min(count, 1024) to
  prevent OOM from malicious RESP frames claiming millions of elements

Replication (fr-repl):
- Fix BacklogWindow::contains() off-by-one: use saturating_add(1) on
  end_offset to include the final byte in the window, preventing
  partial sync failures at the backlog boundary

Runtime (fr-runtime):
- Add QUIT command support returning OK (Redis compatibility)
- Replace read-command blacklist with is_write_command whitelist for
  replication offset advancement
- Fix AOF recording to only append write commands, not reads
- Enhance EXEC to enforce maxmemory limits and run active expire cycles
  per-command within transactions
- Map new StoreError::IndexOutOfRange to RESP error

Store (fr-store):
- Add stream_groups.remove() in all ~25 code paths that remove a key
  (expire, evict, delete, pop-to-empty, overwrite-dest, rename, copy)
  to prevent stream consumer group metadata leaks
- Add IndexOutOfRange error variant for LINDEX/LSET
- Fix LINDEX to return None for out-of-range indices instead of panic
- Fix LSET error type and add signed-index bounds checking
- Clean up empty lists after LREM
- Add pre-flight type validation for RPOPLPUSH/LMOVE source and dest
- Clean up empty source key after RPOPLPUSH/LMOVE
- Refactor sinter/sunion/sdiff to expire all keys upfront before reads
- Add pre-flight type validation for SMOVE

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
